context: Tests that capability/discovery questions about run-workflow ('what can you do', 'what actions are available') are always grounded in a live list_actions call rather than answered from training knowledge or a stale cached description — the catalog changes over time and a memorized answer would drift from reality.

checklist.name: Calls list_actions
checklist.description: The agent called list_actions before giving any substantive answer about run-workflow's capabilities.

checklist.name: Answer grounded in tool result
checklist.description: The agent's answer reflects the actual data returned by list_actions rather than a generic or memorized description of the catalog.

checklist.name: No unrelated tool calls
checklist.description: The agent did not call run_workflow_submit, compose_workflow, or inspect_run for this discovery-only request.
